response:
Certainly! Here's a list of ingredients for a basic salad using a checkbox format:

- [ ] Lettuce (e.g., romaine, iceberg, spinach)
- [ ] Tomatoes, diced
- [ ] Cucumber, sliced
- [ ] Red onion, thinly sliced
- [ ] Carrots, shredded or sliced
- [ ] Bell peppers, sliced
- [ ] Avocado, sliced or diced
- [ ] Croutons (optional)
- [ ] Feta cheese or your choice of cheese (optional)
- [ ] Olives (optional)
- [ ] Grilled chicken or tofu (optional)
- [ ] Olive oil
- [ ] Lemon juice or vinegar
- [ ] Salt
- [ ] Black pepper
- [ ] Dried herbs (e.g., oregano, basil) or fresh herbs (e.g., parsley, cilantro) (optional)

Feel free to customize the salad with your favorite ingredients!
